title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to set up and use Claude Code locally for free via Ollama to build agentic AI applications. The example project is a travel agency app with multiple AI agents, a Flask backend, and an HTML/CSS frontend, using open models like Qwen 3.5.
